file_path.description: The absolute path to the file to read

offset.description: The line number to start reading from (1-based)

limit.description: The number of lines to read (default: 2000)

function.description: Read only this function/method/type. For .go files uses AST; for others uses regex. Overrides offset/limit

force.description: Force re-read even if cached (default: false)

hashes.description: Prefix each line with a short content-hash anchor (columns: line<TAB>anchor<TAB>content). Pass an anchor to edit's anchor= to replace that line without reproducing it as old_string (saves output tokens). Default: false

question.description: The research question / sub-question to put to every healthy model in parallel. Phrase it as one self-contained prompt (the models do not see the conversation).

models.description: Optional: restrict the panel to these served model names. Empty/omitted = all currently-healthy models the router serves (the default — fan out to everything that is up).

spill_id.description: The spillover reference ID (e.g., sp_abc123) from a previous large tool result

file_path.description: The absolute path to the file to write

content.description: The content to write to the file

file_path.description: The absolute path to the file to modify

old_string.description: The text to replace (must be unique unless replace_all is true). When regex=true, treated as a regex pattern

new_string.description: The text to replace it with. When regex=true, supports $1/$2 backreferences

replace_all.description: Replace all occurrences instead of requiring a unique match (default: false)

regex.description: Treat old_string as a regex pattern (default: false)

line.description: Replace at a specific line number (1-based). When set, old_string matches only on this line

anchor.description: Content-hash anchor from read(hashes=true) identifying the line to replace. Replaces the whole anchored line with new_string — no old_string needed. Errors if the anchor matches zero or multiple (identical) lines

anchor_end.description: Optional second anchor. With anchor set, replaces the inclusive line range anchor..anchor_end with new_string (which may span multiple lines)

pattern.description: Regular expression pattern to search for

path.description: File or directory to search in

contextLines.description: Lines of context around each match (0-10)

before.description: Lines of context before each match (overrides contextLines for before)

after.description: Lines of context after each match (overrides contextLines for after)

multiline.description: Enable multiline matching (patterns can span lines, . matches newlines)

mode.description: Output mode: content (default, matching lines), files_only (file paths only), count (match counts per file)

background.description: Run in background immediately, then use process tool to check output

structured.description: Return JSON with stdout, stderr, exit_code, runtime_ms instead of plain text

env.description: Environment variables to set for this command (key-value pairs). Blocked keys (API keys, secrets) are filtered.

sessionId.description: Session ID for actions other than list

input.description: Data to write to process stdin (required for write action)

url.description: URL to fetch (HTML extraction + bot evasion). YouTube links return the video's transcript (split into chapter sections with [m:ss] timestamps) plus metadata (title/channel/views/tags/chapters) — use this to summarize or analyze a YouTube video from its captions without watching it. Reach for the watch tool only when you need to SEE the frames.

query.description: Web search query. Serper (Google) > Brave > DuckDuckGo fallback

fetch.description: Auto-fetch top N results per query (1-3, default: 0)

count.description: Number of search results per query (default: 5)

type.description: Serper search type: news (Google News), scholar (Google Scholar), autocomplete (search suggestions). Default: regular web search.

name: cron
description:
Manage scheduled tasks (cron jobs). Actions: add (create), list (all jobs), status (service health),
get (job detail), update (modify), remove (delete), run (execute now), runs (execution history).
Schedule formats: cron expression (0 9 * * * = daily 9am), interval (30m, 1h), one-shot (ISO timestamp).
Common patterns: 0 9 * * * (daily 9am), 0 */2 * * * (every 2h), 0 9 * * 1-5 (weekdays 9am), @daily, @hourly.

name.description: Job name (required for add, used as job ID)

schedule.description: Schedule specification. Formats: cron (0 9 * * *), interval (1h, 30m, every 5m), timestamp (2026-04-06T08:00:00), shorthand (@daily, @hourly, @weekly)

command.description: Agent message/command to execute on schedule (required for add)

enabled.description: Enable or disable a job (for add/update)

limit.description: Max entries to return (for runs action, default 10)

tz.description: Timezone for cron schedules (e.g. Asia/Seoul, UTC). Defaults to system local timezone

staggerMs.description: Random delay window in ms to distribute cron jobs (cron kind only, default: auto for top-of-hour)

anchorTime.description: Anchor time for interval schedules (ISO 8601). Intervals count from this time instead of registration time

retryCount.description: Number of retry attempts on failure (0-3, default 0 = no retry)

retryBackoffMs.description: Initial backoff delay between retries in ms (default 5000). Doubles each retry, capped at 60s

deliveryMode.description: How to deliver output: announce (send to the user, default) or none (run silently)

thinking.description: Per-job thinking level for the agent turn. "off" disables the thinking phase (use for routine, well-templated jobs - much faster on the dual-mode main model). Levels minimal/low/medium/high set a budget; "default" clears the override.

job.description: Job definition object (alternative to top-level name/schedule/command)

text.description: System event text for wake action

name: morning_letter
description: Collect the six morning-letter data sections in parallel — weather (Gwangju), exchange rates, copper price, today's calendar, unread email, upcoming wiki deadlines — and return raw JSON. The agent composes the letter (tone, interpretation, priorities). No parameters.

name: evening_letter
description: Collect the evening-letter data sections in parallel — calendar (today + tomorrow), unhandled email, approaching wiki deadlines — and return raw JSON. The end-of-day counterpart to morning_letter; the morning-only market sections (weather, FX, copper) are omitted. The agent composes the letter (reflection, tomorrow prep, priorities). No parameters.

action.description: Gateway action. config_get/config_set: read or write a single dotted path. config.get: full config snapshot. config.apply: replace the whole config. config.patch: merge a patch object. config.schema.lookup: schema for a path. Destructive actions (restart/update/config_set/config.apply/config.patch) require approval: the first call returns a needs_approval envelope; after the user confirms, call the .confirmed variant with the same action_token.

path.description: Dotted config path for config_get / config_set (e.g. "model.main"). Also used for config.schema.lookup.

value.description: Leaf value to write (config_set only). Must be a scalar, array, or null — object replacement is rejected.

action_token.description: Token returned by a prior approval envelope; required when calling a .confirmed variant.

limit.description: Max sessions (list) or messages (history, default 20) to return

model.description: Model role to use (default: main; implementer uses coding automatically when configured)

tool_preset.description: Tool preset restricting which tools the sub-agent can use. researcher=context gathering (read/grep/web/mail_archive/wiki/knowledge/polaris/contacts/graphify; no shell, no file writes, no Gmail OAuth surface), implementer=researcher+write/edit/exec/process, verifier=read/grep/exec/process only (build/test validation). Omit for the full toolset

action.description: Sub-agent management action. 'result' returns a finished sub-agent's output (pull a result on demand, complementing the automatic completion notification).

target.description: Target sub-agent index, label, or session key (for result/kill/steer). Optional when exactly one sub-agent exists.

file_path.description: Path to the file to send

type.description: Media type. Auto-detected from MIME if omitted

chart_type.description: 데이터 성격에 맞게 고른다 — 시간에 따른 추이=line, 점층 누적/면적 강조=area, 항목 간 비교=bar, 전체 대비 구성비(부분의 합=전체)=doughnut. 막대+추세선 콤보는 bar로 두고 한 시리즈에 type:line을 지정.

subtitle.description: 제목 아래 보조 설명 한 줄 (선택, 예: '2026년 상반기 · 단위 건')

labels.description: x축 항목(line/area/bar) 또는 도넛 조각 이름. 순서대로 series의 data와 1:1 대응.

name.description: 시리즈 이름 (범례에 표시). 시리즈가 1개면 생략 가능.

type.description: 이 시리즈만 다른 모양으로 그릴 때 (콤보 차트). bar 차트 위에 추세선을 얹으려면 line.

series.description: 데이터 시리즈 목록. line/area/bar는 여러 시리즈 가능(겹쳐 그림), doughnut은 첫 시리즈만 사용.

y_unit.description: y축 값의 단위 (선택, 예: '건', '만원', '%'). line/area/bar에만 적용.

diagram_type.description: flowchart=절차·흐름·관계·상태도(노드+화살표), gantt=일정(작업별 기간 막대), timeline=연혁·이력·로드맵(시점별 사건). 숫자 비교/추이는 diagram이 아니라 chart를 써라.

subtitle.description: 제목 아래 보조 설명 한 줄 (선택)

nodes.description: flowchart 노드 목록. 각 노드는 고유 id로 edges에서 참조된다.

id.description: 노드 고유 식별자 (edges의 from/to가 이 값을 참조). 예: 'apply'.

label.description: 노드에 표시할 텍스트. 생략하면 id를 표시.

shape.description: 노드 모양. 의사결정/분기는 diamond, 시작/끝은 stadium, 일반 단계는 rect.

edges.description: flowchart 화살표 목록. from 노드 → to 노드.

tasks.description: gantt 작업 목록. 각 작업은 기간 막대 하나가 된다.

section.description: 작업을 묶는 구간 이름 (선택, 예: '준비', '시공'). 같은 section끼리 그룹으로 표시.

events.description: timeline 사건 목록. 각 항목은 한 시점(period)과 그때 일어난 일들(items).

path.description: Store path for list/download/share/analyze/delete/mkdir, and the source path for move (e.g. /메일/견적서.pdf). Empty means the store root (list). delete removes a file or empty folder; mkdir creates a folder (parents included).

query.description: Search query (for the search action). Matches file/folder names by default; set content=true to also match inside extracted file text (PDF/Word/Excel/PowerPoint/text).

local_path.description: Local file path to save into the store (for the upload action)

dest_path.description: Destination store path: for upload (default: /<local filename>), and the target path for move (a rename is a move within the same folder; an existing target is auto-renamed).

overwrite.description: Overwrite an existing file on upload; default false auto-renames

extract.description: On download, also extract text (PDF/image OCR, Excel/Word/PowerPoint, text files)

content.description: On search, also match inside extracted file contents (PDF/Word/Excel/PowerPoint/text), not just file names. Slower (reads and extracts each file). Default false (name-only).

semantic.description: On search, rank files by meaning (BGE-M3 vector similarity) instead of literal substring match — finds files about the query even when they phrase it differently. Equivalent to the semantic_search action. Falls back to name/content search when the embedding server is unavailable. Default false.

action.description: Action: list (search/browse skills), create, patch, delete, read, list_files, write_file, remove_file

query.description: Search filter for list action (matches name, description, category, tag)

category.description: Filter category for list, or target category for create (coding, productivity, devops, integration)

content.description: Full SKILL.md content for create, or patch content

old_text.description: Text to find in SKILL.md (patch action). Fuzzy whitespace matching

file_path.description: Relative path within skill dir for read/write_file/remove_file. Writes/removes must stay under references/, templates/, scripts/, or assets/

file_content.description: Content for write_file support file writes

apply.description: Immediately invalidate the system prompt skills cache so the change is visible in the current session (default: false — changes load on next session to preserve prompt-cache hit rate).

action.description: Action: search (ripgrep full-text search), read (read wiki page), index (read master/category index), write (create/update page), log (append diary entry), daily (read recent diary), status (wiki stats)

query.description: Search query (search), page path (read/write), category name (index), or diary entry body (log)

category.description: Wiki category for write action or index filter — one of the 6: 프로젝트(일·거래·결정), 인물(사람·조직), 시스템(Deneb 구성·운영), 업무(직무 도메인 지식), 사용자(개인 선호·규칙), 기타(시사·잡학·그 외)

content.description: Page body content in markdown (write action) or diary entry body (log action). In write bodies, link related pages inline with [[path-or-title]] (e.g. [[프로젝트/dgx-spark]] or [[홍길동]]); these become knowledge-graph edges, so prefer them over plain mentions.

supersedes.description: Existing wiki page paths this write replaces because the new fact contradicts or supersedes them. Marking them demotes stale pages in recall/search.

type.description: Page type (write action): concept, entity, source, comparison, log

confidence.description: Confidence level (write action): high (verified), medium (reasonable inference), low (uncertain)

due.description: Upcoming deadline in YYYY-MM-DD (write action): payment due, delivery, or milestone date. Surfaced by the morning letter deadline scan.

section.description: Read a specific section from the page (read action)

action.description: create: 노트북 생성. for_deal: 딜/프로젝트의 노트북 보기(없으면 생성, deal_ref). pin_to_deal: 딜 노트북에 자료 한 번에 저장(없으면 생성; deal_ref+kind+ref/text). list: 노트북 목록. show: 핀된 자료 보기(id 또는 deal_ref). add_source: 자료 핀. remove_source: 자료 제거. delete: 노트북 삭제. brief: 핀된 자료 근거 인용([S1]) 1회 브리핑 데이터(모델 종합; id 또는 deal_ref). open: 이 세션을 노트북에 묶어 이후 모든 답을 그 자료 위주로(id 또는 deal_ref). close: 노트북 닫고 일반 모드 복귀. mode: 그라운딩 강도 전환(id+mode=soft|strict).

deal_ref.description: 딜/프로젝트 고유코드 (for_deal/pin_to_deal, 또는 show/brief에서 id 대신). 위키 프로젝트 페이지 frontmatter의 code(예: pl1-wdo-dev-001 — 부서-고객-거래타입-순번)를 쓴다. 코드는 페이지가 이동·재분류돼도 안 변하는 식별자라, raw 증거(노트북)와 정제 사실(위키)이 한 딜로 안정적으로 묶인다(둘 다 같은 코드).

deal_name.description: 딜 노트북 자동 생성 시 이름 (for_deal/pin_to_deal, 선택; 미지정 시 deal_ref 사용).

kind.description: 자료 유형 (add_source): wiki=위키 페이지(ref=경로, 라이브). note=붙여넣기 텍스트(text). file=파일 경로(ref=경로; PDF·이미지 OCR, 그 외 텍스트). url=웹페이지(ref=URL, 본문 추출). mail=메일 스레드(ref=스레드/메시지 id). diary=일기 항목(ref=날짜/id). file·url·mail·diary는 추가 시점에 본문을 스냅샷.

ref.description: 자료 위치 (kind별): wiki=페이지 경로('프로젝트/topsolar.md'/'w:프로젝트/topsolar'), file=파일 경로(PDF·이미지·텍스트), url=웹 주소(https://…), mail=메일 스레드/메시지 id, diary=일기 날짜/id.

title.description: 자료 표시 이름 (add_source, 선택; wiki는 미지정 시 페이지 제목 자동).

text.description: 자료 본문 (kind=note) — 메일 본문·견적·회의 메모 등 붙여넣기 텍스트.

focus.description: 브리핑 초점 (brief, 선택) — 예: '계약 조건과 리스크 위주로'.

mode.description: 그라운딩 강도 (mode 액션): soft=자료 우선이되 부족하면 일반 지식으로 보충하고 (자료 밖) 표시(기본), strict=자료에만 근거하고 없으면 '자료에 없음'.

action.description: lookup: 전화번호로 인물 찾기 (정규화·+82↔0·뒷자리 폴백). search: 이름·회사·이메일·번호 부분일치 검색 (최대 20건).

query.description: 조회할 전화번호 (lookup) 또는 검색어 — 이름/회사/이메일/번호 일부 (search).

action.description: list: 일정 조회 (기본 지금부터 48시간; from/to로 명시 범위, 또는 hours_ahead). 겹치는 일정은 ⚠️로, 연결된 일정은 [미팅]·「메일 제목」으로 출처 표시. get: id로 상세(참석자·장소·Meet·메모·연결 출처 — 미팅 준비용). create: 일정 추가(로컬). update: 로컬 일정 수정. delete: 로컬 일정 삭제. free_slots: 근무시간 내 빈 시간(미팅 넣을 자리) 찾기. brief: 오늘(기본; hours_ahead/from·to로 기간) 일정을 연결된 메일 맥락·겹침과 함께 브리핑 골격으로 정리 — 연결된 일정은 mail_archive로 맥락 보강해 '왜 중요한지·무엇을 준비할지'까지 서술. prep: 미팅 준비 — id(생략 시 다음 일정)의 상세 + 연결된 메일을 mail_archive로 열어 직전 합의·미결·준비물 체크리스트 작성 지시. capture: 회의록 정리(끝난 미팅) — id(생략 시 방금 끝난 미팅)의 메모·녹취를 결정·액션·리스크·후속으로 정리하고 update로 일정 description에 기록(일정 자체가 회의 기록). 임원 본인 후속만 강조, 위임 실무는 본문에. audit: 일정 점검·시간 보호 — 기간(기본 7일; from/to·hours_ahead) 내 더블부킹·과부하 날·버퍼 없는 연속 회의를 짚고 보호할 포커스 블록을 제안. timeline: 워크그래프 — query(거래처·프로젝트·인물·장소)와 관련된 일정을 과거 90일~향후 90일(또는 from/to)에서 모아 한 타임라인으로, 연결된 메일·위키·거래 맥락을 엮도록 안내. 구글 일정은 읽기 전용이라 수정·삭제 불가.

id.description: 이벤트 ID (get/update/delete). list 결과의 'id=...' 값을 그대로 사용. 'local:' 접두사면 로컬(수정·삭제 가능), 아니면 구글(읽기 전용).

from.description: list 조회 시작 시각 (RFC3339, 예: 2026-06-10T00:00:00+09:00). to와 함께 명시 범위 조회.

start.description: 시작 시각 (RFC3339, create/update 필수, 예: 2026-06-10T15:00:00+09:00). KST는 +09:00 오프셋.

end.description: 종료 시각 (RFC3339, 선택). 생략 시 1시간(종일은 1일) 자동.

duration_min.description: free_slots: 찾을 빈 시간의 최소 길이(분, 기본 30).

day_start.description: free_slots: 근무시간 시작 시(0-23, 기본 9 = 오전 9시).

day_end.description: free_slots: 근무시간 끝 시(1-24, 기본 18 = 오후 6시).

query.description: timeline: 관련 일정을 모을 대상 — 거래처·프로젝트·인물·장소 이름(제목·연결 메일 제목·장소·참석자와 매칭).

action.description: search: 현재 세션의 과거 메시지에서 키워드 검색 (모든 메시지가 SQLite FTS에 무손실 저장). describe: 압축된 요약 구간 ID 목록 (time_range 필터). expand: 특정 summary_id의 원문 메시지 복원, question 추가 시 LLM이 원문 기반 답변.

time_range.description: 시간 범위 (describe action): today, this_week, all

summary_id.description: 요약 노드 ID (expand action, describe 결과에서 획득)

question.description: 원본 대화에서 알고 싶은 질문 (expand action, 선택)

op.description: recall: 위키 지식베이스 의미+키워드 검색. read: ref로 단건 fetch — `w:인물/박부장` 같이 prefix가 layer 라우팅. record: wiki에 큐레이션 페이지 작성·갱신.

page.description: wiki 페이지 상대 경로 (op=record). 카테고리/이름 형식 — 예: `인물/박부장`, `프로젝트/ABC상사-NDA`

title.description: 페이지 제목 (op=record, 미지정 시 page의 마지막 segment 사용)

body.description: 페이지 본문 markdown (op=record). 비어 있으면 새 페이지에 기본 골격 자동 삽입

supersedes.description: 새 기록이 모순/갱신으로 대체하는 기존 wiki 페이지 경로들 (op=record). stale 페이지는 superseded_by로 표시되어 recall/search에서 감가된다.

importance.description: Tier1 surfacing 가중치 0.0~1.0 (op=record, 0.85↑은 시스템 프롬프트에 자동 노출)

names.description: Exact tool names to activate (from the deferred tools list)

query.description: Keyword search to find matching deferred tools (alternative to names)

action.description: query: BFS/DFS traversal of the knowledge graph for a natural-language question. explain: plain-language description of a node and its neighbors. path: shortest path between two nodes

node.description: Required for action=explain. Node label (page id, file path, symbol, or function name) to explain

from.description: Required for action=path. Source node label

to.description: Required for action=path. Target node label

budget.description: Optional for action=query. Max output tokens (default: 2000)

dfs.description: Optional for action=query. Use depth-first instead of breadth-first traversal (default: false)

graph.description: Which graph to query. "wiki" (default, ~/.deneb/wiki-graph/graph.json — concept/entity knowledge from the wiki dreamer), "code" (workspace/graphify-out/graph.json — call/import graph built by graphify update), or an absolute/relative path to a custom graph.json

content.description: Full new contents of ~/.deneb/HEARTBEAT.md. Pass empty string to clear the file. The autonomous heartbeat loop reads this file every 30 minutes; remove completed/cancelled items, update progress on ongoing items, and use a '## archive' section for items that have stalled.

title.description: Title of the to-do (required for add)

id.description: To-do id for done/delete (run list first to get it)

done.description: Completion state for the done action (default true)

source.description: YouTube URL or local video file path. Extracts representative frames + the subtitle transcript (with chapter sections) and analyzes them with the vision model — the model SEES the screen, not just the captions. For transcript/chapter summarization without needing the visuals, the web tool on the YouTube URL is lighter and faster.

task.description: What to analyze in the video (e.g. 'analyze the hook in the first 3 seconds', 'where does the UI break?'). Default: general analysis

start.description: Optional analysis window start in seconds

end.description: Optional analysis window end in seconds

action.description: What to observe about your own runtime: turn | logs | behavior | effort | proactive

runId.description: Run id — required for action=turn; optional filter for action=logs

level.description: Min log level for action=logs: debug | info | warn | error (default debug)

days.description: Window in days for action=behavior and action=effort (omit = all retained history)

contains.description: Substring filter on the log message for action=logs

action.description: What to do with the SparkFleet GPU control plane: status (nodes + recipes + recent failed jobs at a glance) | recipes (every model recipe with running/health) | jobs (recent background jobs) | launch | stop | restart (a recipe by name) | cancel (a background job by id) | diagnose (crash triage of a running recipe's container)

recipe.description: Recipe name — required for launch / stop / restart / diagnose

jobId.description: Background job id — required for cancel

what.description: 조회 대상: location(현재 GPS 좌표) | clipboard(방금 복사한 내용) | battery(배터리·충전 상태) | calllog(최근 통화기록 20건) | contacts(폰 주소록)

to.description: 작용 대상: notification(알림 띄우기) | tts(음성으로 읽어주기) | clipboard(클립보드에 넣기)

name: goal
description: Set and manage a standing goal (Ralph loop) the agent keeps working toward across turns while the user is idle.

goal.description: Objective text (required for action=set). Free-form, e.g. '탑솔라 6월 견적을 정리해 초안까지'.

subgoal.description: A specific completion criterion to add (required for action=subgoal). The judge requires per-criterion evidence before marking the goal done.

max_turns.description: Optional run budget for action=set (default 20). Auto-pauses (resumable) when exhausted.

action.description: list(최근/오늘 메일 목록+Locator) | search(키워드 검색+Locator) | read(Locator/ID 또는 query로 원문 열기; 첨부는 이름만 표시) | thread(References/In-Reply-To + 제목/참여자 fallback 기반 전체 스레드 복원) | project_history(회사·프로젝트 키워드 시간선+스레드 후보; 로컬 FTS+업무 신호 랭킹) | attachment(그 메일의 첨부 PDF/Excel/Word/이미지를 실제로 열어 본문 텍스트를 추출 — 견적서·계약서·세금계산서 내용을 직접 읽을 때. message_id 또는 query로 메일을 지정하고, attachment로 어떤 첨부인지 고른다)

mailbox.description: 조회할 메일함 selector. all(기본: 설정된 자체 아카이브 전체) | INBOX(자동보관 수신함) | archive/backfill(일반/과거 백필 mailbox; Archive/All Mail/Gmail 후보) | legacy_gmail(구 Gmail 백필 mailbox) | 실제 IMAP mailbox 이름

query.description: search/project_history의 검색어. read/thread에서 message_id가 없으면 이 query의 최신 상위 메일을 seed로 사용

message_id.description: read/thread/attachment에서 열 기준. mail_archive 결과의 Locator를 그대로 넣는 것이 가장 안정적이며, 일반 Message-ID-derived ID도 가능

attachment.description: action=attachment에서 어떤 첨부를 읽을지 선택. 비우면 그 메일의 모든 문서·이미지 첨부를 추출. 파일명 일부(예: '견적', '계약서') 또는 1-기반 인덱스('1','2')로 특정 첨부만 지정

include_body.description: search/project_history/list 결과에 본문 일부까지 포함할지. 기본 false; 전체 맥락은 read/thread를 선호

as_json.description: true면 사람이 읽는 텍스트 대신 구조화 JSON을 반환한다. code_action에서는 deneb.mail_archive(..., as_json=True)로 메시지/히스토리, Locator, rank_reasons, related_wiki, related_events를 바로 조인·필터링할 수 있다
